query:
SELECT 
  JSON_LENGTH(payload->'$.transactions') as tx_count,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[0].type') as first_tx_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[1].type') as second_tx_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[2].type') as third_tx_type
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2026 AND viewName = 'combined'
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yMVuFXFfyKno5zd.8bace71a6706 --database D7EDTbt5uXwnUBkJHewERh --execute SELECT 
  JSON_LENGTH(payload->'$.transactions') as tx_count,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[0].type') as first_tx_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[1].type') as second_tx_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[2].type') as third_tx_type
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2026 AND viewName = 'combined'
LIMIT 1;
